final:
module top_module(
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire        ena,
    input  wire [ 7:0] A,
    input  wire [ 7:0] B,
    output reg  [15:0] Z
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
        if (ena) Z <= A * B;

endmodule
